text: Last summer, I finally took my dream trip to Japan. I spent weeks planning a trip, researching hotels, train routes, and must-see sights. Arriving in Tokyo was overwhelming but exciting. I loved exploring new cultures, like visiting ancient temples and learning local customs. The food was incredible—I tried sushi from a small street stall and warm ramen on a rainy evening. Language barriers were a challenge; my basic phrases often met with confused smiles, but gestures and patience helped. Now, the memories of those days—the bright neon lights, the polite bowing, the taste of green tea ice cream—stay with me vividly.
